name: Reflecting Shard
description:
Activate r command

Trigger You are targeted by a spell of 5th level or lower

Requirements You're a master in Athletics, and you have the affixed shield raised.

This mirrored metal fragment is bolted or welded to the face of the affixed shield. When you Activate it, you attempt to reflect the triggering spell back at its caster with , using your Athletics modifier for the counteract check. The talisman's counteract rank is 7th.
